# patterns-svg-backgrounds

**Count:** 278 SVG files (target: 100+ — exceeds)
**Source:** svgbackgrounds.com and related public SVG-shape libraries
**Acquired:** direct curl of publicly served SVG assets. No account walls. Files cover blobs, badges, circles, bridges, catchers, checks, bubbles, arrow-stacks, asterisks, bowties, and more.

## Top 10 picks for Clawmachine

1. `additional-blob.svg` — soft blob shape; hero-section background slot.
2. `blob-spray-stroke-sm.svg` — small stroke-only blob; sticker / accent role.
3. `bridge.svg` — connection motif; between-systems / integration graphics.
4. `catcher-mit-blob.svg` — distinctive shape; empty-state hero.
5. `circle-4-in-diamond-layout.svg` — geometric cluster; status indicator grid.
6. `circle-8-in-octogon-layout.svg` — dense geometric; page headers.
7. `bubble-clean-1.svg` — clean chat bubble; agent-chat surfaces.
8. `badge-square-and-plus-round.svg` — compound badge; achievement / tag slot.
9. `asterisk-1.svg` — asterisk accent; inline emphasis, annotation marks.
10. `arrow-stack-up.svg` — stacked arrow; priority / trending indicators.

## Layout

Flat. Descriptive names. Families group by prefix (`blob-`, `bubble-`, `circle-`, `bridge-`, etc.).

## Usage

Most files are single-path filled shapes. Use as inline SVG for runtime recolour, or as background-image for static decorative slots.
